pages.name: Homepage
pages.content:
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <meta name="description" content="Professional wellness coaching platform for personal growth, life coaching, and wellness practitioners. Transform your life with expert guidance." />
    <meta name="keywords" content="wellness coaching, life coaching, personal growth, wellness practitioners, self-development, coaching platform" />
    <meta name="author" content="Wellness Coach Platform" />
    <meta name="robots" content="index, follow" />

    <!-- Open Graph meta tags for social sharing -->
    <meta property="og:title" content="Wellness Coach Platform - Transform Your Life" />
    <meta property="og:description" content="Professional wellness coaching platform for personal growth and transformation" />
    <meta property="og:type" content="website" />
    <meta property="og:site_name" content="Wellness Coach Platform" />

    <!-- Twitter Card meta tags -->
    <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image" />
    <meta name="twitter:title" content="Wellness Coach Platform - Transform Your Life" />
    <meta name="twitter:description" content="Professional wellness coaching platform for personal growth and transformation" />

    <!-- Theme colors -->
    <meta name="theme-color" content="#2E7D6B" />
    <meta name="msapplication-TileColor" content="#2E7D6B" />

    <!-- Favicon -->
    <link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="/assets/favicon-40cbeb11.svg" />
    <link rel="icon" type="image/x-icon" href="/favicon.ico" />
    <link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="/apple-touch-icon.png" />
    <link rel="manifest" href="/site.webmanifest" />

    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
    <link
      href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto&display=swap"
